zh.lifeSummary: John Richard Bland是Robert Bland的兒子，於1476年出生在英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾利德斯。他和Grace Poole至少有2個兒子。他去世於1555年7月22日在英國英格蘭恩布利亞奧爾頓享年79歲，埋葬在英國越可爾波內斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Bland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place called Bland in Sedburgh, Yorkshire, the origin of which is uncertain. Possibly it is from Old English (ge)bland ‘storm, commotion’ (from blandan ‘to blend or mingle’), with reference to its exposed situation. The modern English adjective bland did not come into English (from Latin) until the 15th century, and is therefore unlikely to have given rise to surnames.
French: nickname from Old French blant ‘flattering’ (from Latin blandus).

variants.name: Blandin
meanings: Altered form of   Blanding  , a surname of English origin.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: John Richard Bland was born in 1476, in Leeds, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Robert Bland. He had at least 2 sons with Grace Poole. He died on 22 July 1555, in Orton, Cumbria, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 79, and was buried in Burneston, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: John Richard Bland est né en 1476, à Leeds, West Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Robert Bland. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Grace Poole. Il est décédé le 22 juillet 1555, à Orton, Cumbria, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterré à Burneston, Everwyck, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: John Richard Blandは1476年にイギリスイギリスウエスト ヨークシュアイアリーズでRobert Blandの息子として生まれた。彼はGrace Pooleとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1555年7月22日にイギリスイギリスクウンブリアオルトンで79歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアブルネストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Richard Bland(은)는 1476년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 리드즈에서 Robert Bland의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Grace Poole(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1555년 7월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 c브리아 오턴에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 버네스턴에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: John Richard Bland родился в 1476 г. в местности лидс, вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Robert Bland. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Grace Poole. Он умер 22 июля 1555 г. в местности ортон, кумбря, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 79 лет и был похоронен в местности бурнестон, еркшир, Англия.
